videos.title: Scarlet Spider and Lizard Team Up!?
videos.description:
Scarlet Spider and The Lizard just made green based stompy decks a bunch of new tools!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-scarlet-spider-and-lizard-team-up
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7349389#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/pa1BL
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/3aP9C
